fire_cannon.title: Fire the cannon and observe the impact

brass_barrel.title: Upgrade to a Bronze or Cast Iron barrel for reduced recoil

description: One shell changes the math of a settlement.
The cannon is not your sword.
It is your argument — and arguments are most useful
when the other side knows you have one.
AP Shot punches through armor and structure.
Shrapnel clears groups. HE demolishes terrain.
Proximity Fuze detonates at close range — useful for arcing shots.
The cannon scales with barrel quality.
Bronze reduces recoil. Cast Iron (TFMG) reduces it further.
You'll need TFMG oil infrastructure for Steel and above.
→ Fire the cannon — observe what it does [check]
→ Upgrade to Bronze or Cast Iron barrel [check]
